title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
